title: Dekton Geckoslide 48pc Furniture Pad Set-Multi-Size| Floor Protection Pads| Non-Slip & Scratch-Resistant| Ideal for Chairs, Tables, & Appliances| Reduces Noise & Prevents Damage| Versatile & Durable
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Comprehensive Protection: The Dekton Geckoslide 48pc Furniture Pad Set provides extensive coverage for all your furniture, including chairs, tables, and appliances. With multiple sizes in one set, you can easily find the right pad for each piece, ensuring complete floor protection and minimizing the risk of scratches and dents on your floors.

Non-Slip & Scratch-Resistant: Each pad is engineered with a high-quality, non-slip backing to keep furniture securely in place. The scratch-resistant surface is designed to prevent damage to both your floors and your furniture, making it ideal for high-traffic areas and heavy appliances.

Noise Reduction: Enjoy a quieter home with the Geckoslide Furniture Pads. These pads are specifically designed to reduce noise caused by moving furniture, offering a peaceful environment free from the annoying squeaks and scrapes that can disrupt your daily life.

Versatile & Durable: Made from durable materials, these furniture pads are built to withstand everyday use. Their versatility makes them suitable for various surfaces, including hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl, providing long-lasting protection and performance.

Multi-Size Set: The set includes a variety of pad sizes to fit different furniture legs and appliances, making it an all-in-one solution for your protection needs. Whether you need pads for small chair legs or larger furniture pieces, this set has you covered, saving you time and effort in finding individual pads.
description: Dekton Geckoslide 48pc Furniture Pad Set Multi Size is an essential solution for protecting your floors and furniture while enhancing comfort and functionality in your home. This comprehensive set includes a variety of multi-sized pads, specifically designed to fit a wide range of furniture pieces, from chairs and tables to appliances. Each pad features a non-slip and scratch-resistant surface that ensures stability and prevents any potential damage to your floors. Crafted with high-quality materials, these pads provide a robust barrier against scratches, dents, and scuffs, preserving the pristine condition of your flooring. The soft, cushioned design absorbs impact and minimizes the sound of furniture movements, creating a quieter and more pleasant living environment. Whether you're sliding a dining chair across the floor or moving a heavy appliance, these pads ensure smooth, noise-free operation. The assortment of sizes allows for precise fitting, ensuring that every piece of furniture has the appropriate protection. These pads are designed for long-lasting durability, withstanding regular wear and tear while maintaining their adhesive strength and effectiveness. Ideal for use on various flooring types, including hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl, the Geckoslide pads offer universal protection. Their easy installation process involves simply peeling off the backing and applying the pad to the bottom of your furniture. This straightforward approach ensures a secure attachment without the need for additional tools or complex procedures.
